auto_run_on_import.explanation: Evolution auto-run on import is enabled (risky).
remediation: Disable `my_sevn.issues.auto_run_on_import` unless intentional.
Review evolution pipeline dry-run flags.
auto_run_on_import.title: auto_run_on_import

browser_readiness.explanation: No browser binary is resolved for the configured engine (Brave/Chromium).
remediation: Install Chrome or Brave on the host, or use Docker profile browser/gui with Brave preinstalled.
Set SEVN_CHROME_EXECUTABLE or skills.browser.engine in sevn.json when using a custom binary.
browser_readiness.title: Browser readiness

code_orientation.explanation: Code-understanding indexes are missing or stale.
remediation: Set `SEVN_REPO_ROOT` or configure code_understanding paths.
Run `sevn doctor --code-orientation` to refresh Graphify/MYCODE caches.
code_orientation.title: Code orientation

cua_cli_binary.explanation: The cua sandbox CLI (`pip install cua`) is required when cua-agent is enabled or computer-use uses a sandbox target.
remediation: Run `pip install cua` or use the onboarding install action for skill.computer_use.cua_cli.
Re-run `sevn doctor` after installing.
cua_cli_binary.title: cua CLI

openwiki_cli.explanation: The LangChain OpenWiki npm CLI must be on PATH when skills.openwiki.enabled is true.
remediation: Run `sevn openwiki install` (or `npm install -g openwiki` when npm is preferred).
Re-run `sevn doctor` after installing.
openwiki_cli.title: OpenWiki CLI

openwiki_credentials.explanation: OpenWiki needs an LLM API key when the skill is enabled. sevn resolves skills.openwiki.api_key, per-provider api_keys, assigned provider secrets, or integration.openwiki.llm_api_key.
remediation: Run `sevn openwiki configure --stdin` or `sevn secrets set integration.openwiki.llm_api_key`.
Optional: set skills.openwiki.api_key to ${SECRET:…} and skills.openwiki.provider.
Re-run `sevn doctor` after storing secrets.
openwiki_credentials.title: OpenWiki credentials

google_workspace.explanation: Google Workspace needs OAuth token, optional Python deps, and optionally gws on PATH when skills.google_workspace.enabled is true.
remediation: Run the bundled setup script to store client secret and complete OAuth.
Install optional deps: uv pip install 'sevn[google-workspace]'.
When prefer_gws is true, install the gws CLI and ensure it is on PATH.
Re-run `sevn doctor` after setup.
google_workspace.title: Google Workspace

cua_driver_binary.explanation: The cua-driver binary is required for computer-use with the host target (MCP passthrough). Run the cua-driver install.sh action when missing.
remediation: Run the cua-driver install.sh onboarding action or install from trycua/cua releases.
Ensure `cua-driver` is on PATH before enabling skills.computer_use.
cua_driver_binary.title: cua-driver

cua_tcc_accessibility.explanation: macOS Accessibility (TCC) is required for computer-use on the host target. Grant it under System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility.
remediation: Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility.
Enable the terminal or app that runs sevn (and CuaDriver.app when using the daemon path).
cua_tcc_accessibility.title: Cua Accessibility (TCC)

cua_tcc_automation.explanation: macOS Automation (Apple Events) may be required for GUI control via computer-use.
remediation: Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Automation.
Allow the sevn host process to control System Events and target applications.
cua_tcc_automation.title: Cua Automation (TCC)

cua_tcc_screen_recording.explanation: macOS Screen Recording (TCC) is required for screenshots and vision capture modes.
remediation: Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording.
Enable the terminal or app that runs sevn (and CuaDriver.app when applicable).
cua_tcc_screen_recording.title: Cua Screen Recording (TCC)

docker.explanation: Docker CLI or daemon is unavailable.
remediation: Install Docker and ensure `docker info` succeeds.
Required for sandbox execution in production profiles.
docker.title: Docker

extensions.explanation: Plugin entry points failed to load.
remediation: Fix setuptools entry points for hooks/channels/dashboard badges.
Reinstall the package after correcting pyproject plugin tables.
extensions.title: Extensions

remediation: Start gateway with `sevn gateway start`.
Check gateway logs under workspace/logs/.
gateway_health.title: Gateway /health

remediation: Wait for migrations and channel startup.
Inspect gateway logs for failing subsystems.
gateway_ready.title: Gateway /ready

gateway_token_configured.explanation: Gateway bearer token is not configured.
remediation: Run `sevn secrets set gateway.token <value>` or complete onboarding.
Restart the gateway after updating secrets.
gateway_token_configured.title: Gateway token

keychain_unlock.explanation: Encrypted secrets store cannot unlock after reboot.
remediation: Run `sevn secrets store-passphrase` on macOS.
Export the unlock env var before starting gateway daemons.
keychain_unlock.title: Keychain unlock

llm_reachability.explanation: Configured LLM endpoint is unreachable via proxy.
remediation: Check provider API keys and proxy routing.
Run `sevn proxy status` and review proxy logs.
llm_reachability.title: LLM reachability

provider_credentials.explanation: An assigned model slot references a provider with no resolvable API key.
remediation: Set providers.<name>.api_key in sevn.json with a ${SECRET:…} ref and store the key.
Run `sevn doctor --fix` to prompt and store missing provider keys.
Per-provider secrets: store SEVN_SECRET_{PROVIDER} and set providers.<name>.api_key refs.
Env escape hatches: OPENAI_API_KEY or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
provider_credentials.title: Provider credentials

openai_oauth_credential.explanation: OpenAI is in Codex OAuth mode but oauth.openai is missing or expired.
remediation: Run `sevn providers oauth login --provider openai` to sign in with ChatGPT.
Run `sevn doctor --fix` to prompt for Codex OAuth reauth interactively.
Ensure providers.openai.auth_mode is oauth only when using subscription OAuth (D1).
openai_oauth_credential.title: OpenAI OAuth (Codex)

llmignore.explanation: The workspace `.llmignore/` directory is missing or a symlink (unsafe).
remediation: Run `sevn doctor --fix --yes` to create the standard blocked/quarantine/incidents layout.
If a symlink remains, replace it with a real directory per specs/09-security-scanner.md.
llmignore.title: .llmignore layout

lume_binary.explanation: The lume CLI is required when skills.lume is enabled (Apple-Silicon VM lifecycle).
remediation: Run the lume install.sh onboarding action or install lume for your platform.
Ensure `lume` is on PATH before enabling skills.lume.
lume_binary.title: lume CLI

my_sevn.explanation: my_sevn bot checkout or sync settings need attention.
remediation: Verify `my_sevn.repo_url` and sync settings in sevn.json.
Run `sevn sync` when the checkout path is configured.
my_sevn.title: my_sevn

operator_lock.explanation: An advisory operator lock file blocks mutating CLI commands.
remediation: Stop any other running `sevn` command if one is active.
Run `sevn doctor --fix --yes` to clear a stale lock, or remove the lock file manually.
operator_lock.title: Operator lock

remediation: Run `uv sync` with the PDF extra if using PDF tools.
WeasyPrint system libraries may also be required.
pdf_extra.title: PDF extra

remediation: Install PDF native libs (`make pdf-native-libs` on macOS).
Optional unless PDF skills are enabled.
pdf_weasyprint.title: PDF (WeasyPrint)

remediation: Run `make printing-press-starter-pack`.
Enable the printing-press espn skill when installed.
pp_espn.title: printing-press espn

remediation: Run `make printing-press-starter-pack`.
Enable the flight-goat skill when installed.
pp_flight_goat.title: printing-press flight-goat

remediation: Run `make printing-press-starter-pack`.
Enable the movie-goat skill when installed.
pp_movie_goat.title: printing-press movie-goat

remediation: Run `make printing-press-starter-pack`.
Enable the recipe-goat skill when installed.
pp_recipe_goat.title: printing-press recipe-goat

remediation: Start the proxy with `sevn proxy start` or docker compose.
Verify `SEVN_PROXY_URL` and proxy token settings.
proxy_healthz.title: Proxy /healthz

remediation: Install Deno and configure sandbox exec driver.
See specs/09-security-scanner.md sandbox section.
pyodide_deno.title: Pyodide sandbox

secrets_backend.explanation: Legacy plaintext secret files remain under `.sevn/secrets/`.
remediation: Review unexpected files under `.sevn/secrets/` before migrating.
Run `sevn doctor --fix --yes` or `sevn doctor --migrate-secrets --yes` to promote into encrypted store.enc.
secrets_backend.title: Legacy plaintext secrets

sevn_cli.explanation: A broken `sevn` symlink on PATH points to a missing target.
remediation: Run `sevn doctor --fix --yes` to remove the broken symlink.
Reinstall with `make install-cli` (uv tool install).
sevn_cli.title: sevn CLI on PATH

sevn_json.explanation: Workspace config is missing or invalid.
remediation: Ensure `workspace/sevn.json` exists and passes `sevn config validate`.
Re-run onboarding with `sevn onboard` if this is a fresh install.
sevn_json.title: sevn.json

remediation: Run `make skillspector-check` for details.
Fix or disable affected bundled skills.
skillspector.title: SkillSpector

remediation: Install dev extras and ensure skillspector is on PATH.
Run `make skillspector-check` locally.
skillspector_extra.title: SkillSpector CLI

sqlite.explanation: The sevn.db write-ahead log is unusually large and may slow startup.
remediation: Ensure no gateway process holds the database open.
Run `sevn doctor --fix --yes` to checkpoint and truncate the WAL.
sqlite.title: SQLite WAL

subagents_registry.explanation: Sub-agent registry storage probe failed or orphaned runs remain after a crash.
remediation: Restart the gateway so the boot orphan sweep reconciles stale running rows.
Inspect `subagent_runs` in sevn.db when orphaned_runs stays non-zero.
Use `sevn subagents list --all` or Mission Control Sub-agents panel for live status.
subagents_registry.title: Sub-agents storage

telegram_probe.explanation: Telegram Bot API probe failed or is not implemented.
remediation: Verify bot token and network egress.
Use gateway channel status for production diagnostics.
telegram_probe.title: Telegram probe

remediation: Configure voice providers in sevn.json.
Install optional voice extras and system dependencies.
voice_backends.title: Voice backends

webapp_https.explanation: Telegram WebApp base URL is not HTTPS.
remediation: Set `channels.telegram.webapp_base_url` to an HTTPS origin.
Use a tunnel or reverse proxy for local development.
webapp_https.title: WebApp HTTPS

browser_cdp_engine.explanation: sevn-native browser CDP engine (websockets) is not installed.
remediation: Run `uv sync --extra browser-cdp` to install the MIT websockets dependency.
Attach Chrome with remote debugging or set tools.browser.spawn_on_miss=true.
browser_cdp_engine.title: Browser (CDP engine)

remediation: Verify witchcraft binary and second_brain settings.
Disable witchcraft when not using second-brain features.
witchcraft_probe.title: Witchcraft

second_brain_vault_layout.explanation: Second Brain vault layout is incomplete or uses legacy paths.wiki alias.
remediation: Run `sevn second-brain setup --vault <path>` or `sevn doctor --fix` to bootstrap legacy raw/, wiki/, and outputs/.
For PARA Obsidian vaults, run `sevn second-brain setup --vault <path> --layout para` (or `--layout auto` to detect).
Set `second_brain.paths.vault` to a workspace-relative Obsidian folder when using a custom vault.
second_brain_vault_layout.title: Second Brain vault

second_brain_vault_layout_para.explanation: PARA Second Brain vault is missing required role folders or root index/log notes.
remediation: Run `sevn second-brain setup --vault <path> --layout para` to scaffold missing PARA folders.
Use `--layout auto` when the vault already has PARA folders (00_Inbox, 10_Projects, …).
Run `sevn doctor --fix` to bootstrap the active layout non-destructively.
second_brain_vault_layout_para.title: Second Brain PARA vault
